emails.subject: Re: Agenda for Houston visit
emails.body: Re: Agenda for Houston visit Christian, good news Vince has approved getting a corporate apartment for your stay please forward your finalized arrival date and extent of stay and I will coordinate Mike

emails.subject: Re: Agenda for Houston visit
emails.body: Hi Mike, Thanks for the message. Here is one more reason why we should have our own in-house modelling: The PCMDI NWP Weather Maps Have Been Discontinued The PCMDI WXMAP web has been discontinued starting 20 December, 2000 Please see the U.S. Navy WXMAPs at I will shortly forward a set of minimum requirements (hardware...), softare has been written by me, with some public domain software. I am thinking of setting up an internal website with model output data, and verification info. Cheers, Christian Mike A Roberts@ECT 21/12/2000 09:26 AM
